name: releases-registry
description: Skills for listing your product on the Releases.sh registry, plus the operator skills for running and maintaining it. Grouping mirrors skills.sh.json so the skills.sh page and the `npx skills add` picker agree.

plugins.name: listing
plugins.description: Owner-facing: discover where you publish release notes and write a valid releases.json manifest to list your product on releases.sh.

plugins.name: onboarding-parsing
plugins.description: Managed-agent skills for onboarding changelog sources and driving the fetch/parse pipeline.

plugins.name: registry-maintenance
plugins.description: Operator skills for maintaining the registry — ingest, backfills, overviews, release content, playbooks, coverage. Most need an admin API key.
